name: Clam & Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the juice from the clams and save it.
2. Chop the clams.
3. Melt butter in a pan.
4. Blend in flour and seasonings (pepper, salt, curry powder).
5. Mix clam juice with milk to make 1 1/2 cups. Add this mixture to the flour blend slowly while cooking over low heat.
6. Stir constantly until the mixture is thick and smooth.
7. Add clams to the mixture.
8. Place half of the potatoes in a greased casserole dish, sprinkle half of the onions over the potatoes, and cover with half of the sauce.
9. Repeat steps 8a-e.
10. Sprinkle with cheese and paprika.
11. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
